data.body: knots.ts:395-405 nextKnot() has no retry logic. kno operations fail with 'database is locked' errors. Should retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s delays) before failing. Critical because nextKnot will be used more heavily once other callsites migrate from kno update --status.
data.title: Add retry with exponential backoff to knots.nextKnot
